sourceMovie.title: Hulk
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Hulk (2003) stuck because it commits to its science fiction premise without apologizing—viewers remember set pieces and momentum as much as plot. Ang Lee's control of tone keeps the ride coherent. The science fiction and adventure blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: The Incredible Hulk
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Hulk clicked for you, The Incredible Hulk (2008) is a strong next stop: both trade in science fiction and adventure, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Star Trek
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Hulk clicked for you, Star Trek (2009) is a strong next stop: both trade in science fiction and adventure, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Underwater
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Hulk clicked for you, Underwater (2020) is a strong next stop: both trade in science fiction and adventure, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Justice League: The New Frontier
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Hulk clicked for you, Justice League: The New Frontier (2008) is a strong next stop: both trade in science fiction and adventure, with earned warmth without mush. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Hulk?
faq.answer: Try The Incredible Hulk, Star Trek, Underwater—each shares DNA with Hulk while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Hulk?
faq.answer: Hulk (2003) is best described as Science Fiction, Adventure, Action. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Hulk worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 5.6/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this science fiction lane.
